MOUNTAIN_SHAPE: single primary open slope with forested ridgeline on the east, compact zero-sen layout
BBOX_DESCRIPTION: base and lodge southeast, summit northwest, Pacific coast visible to the east, Hakkoda range to the west
COURSE_SUMMARY: 5 runs total — beginner 25%, intermediate 36%, advanced 39% (tenki.jp reference)
COURSE_DATA:
Official pamphlet layout (courses implied by terrain, NO colored overlay lines):
- Course 1 (Beginner): straight groomed run center-right of main slope, from pair lift upper area to base
- Course 2 (Intermediate): left-center of main face, from upper mountain west of lift line to mid-slope
- Course 3 (Advanced): short steep summit section at top center, mogul/ungroomed texture
- Course 4 (Beginner): long forest perimeter loop on west side, wrapping around left forest mass to base
- Course 5 (Beginner): isolated gentle bench on far right, separate from main slope, pony lift zone
STYLE_REFERENCE: Match reference/style-plate-v2.png exactly: polished digital painting, dark green conifer forest, soft snow shadows, brown wooden lodge, T-shaped parking lot with turnaround bulb, chairlift with lattice towers, pony lift with orange-capped poles. NOT flat schematic map.
LAYOUT_REFERENCE: Match positional relationships from reference/official-map-trace-source.png: 5 course zones, pair lift center-right diagonal, pony lift on east bench, base southeast.
LIFT_DATA:
- Pair Lift (chair_lift, OSM way/631879096): ~408m, ~4min ride, bottom at SE base lodge area (141.09973, 40.69845), top at NW summit (141.09528, 40.69766), diagonal lower-right to upper-left on image
- Pony Lift (rope_tow, skimap+GSI): ~180m, bottom east beginner zone (141.0995, 40.69726), top upslope (141.1003, 40.69744), short line on lower-right face
FACILITY_DATA:
- Main lodge / center house: grey-roof building at base of pair lift, southeast
- Parking lot: large dirt lot southeast base, ~8-10 car capacity visible on GSI
- Ticket office: adjacent to main lodge at base
- Night skiing floodlights: along main slope (optional in illustration)
LANDMARK_DATA: Hakkoda mountains west background, rice paddies and farmland east, forest belt on east ridge, clear winter sky
WEATHER: cold crisp, light high clouds optional

COLOR_PALETTE: groomed white-blue slopes, dark green conifer forest, grey lodge roofs, subtle blue shadows
